name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
ཐིཋྀ ~ Chuuya wants to build a connection with someone, so he decides to buy a human being (aka you) to fulfil that goal ‎

‎

Warnings

  • Human trafficking, physical/emotional abuse, hitting/punching/kicking/etc, degrading, threats, possible dub/non-con (Not scripted in, but a possibility that it could happen)

‎

One of my more concerning bots. I love Chuuya and see him as a gentleman, but I need mean & obsessive Chuuya in my life right now (I'm sane guys). That and my wife promised me waffles if I went through with the idea and I absolutely NEED one I am going to do less insane bots, I just had to get this out of my system 🙏
